name: cardio
description: Slim your CLAUDE.md into a lean index; move the detail into a well-organized docs/ folder that loads on demand (MOC + PARA + Zettelkasten). Non-destructive, idempotent, git-reversible.

plugins.name: drydocs
plugins.description: Slim your CLAUDE.md into a lean index; extract the detail into a well-organized docs/ folder using MOC + PARA + Zettelkasten. Idempotent, git-reversible, non-destructive.
